lines.text: Selaam aleikum.
lines.actual_meaning: I am here. You know what it means that I am here.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: Aleikum selaam.
lines.actual_meaning: I see you. I will not pretend I do not.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: Sit. The bread is warm. My house is your house tonight.
lines.actual_meaning: Whatever comes through that door after you, it comes through me first.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "Selaam aleikum." — radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: Ne habar?
lines.actual_meaning: I already know the answer. I need to hear how much you will tell me.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: Habar yok.
lines.actual_meaning: There is nothing you need to carry. Not yet.

lines.text: The hares keep debating how to drive away the eagles. The Russians burned the hay in Mitchit. May their faces be torn.
lines.actual_meaning: My village is exposed. You have brought the eagles closer by coming here.

lines.text: Who tends your animals tonight?
lines.actual_meaning: I understand the danger you are in. I am not asking you to say it aloud.

lines.text: My son. He knows.
lines.actual_meaning: The house is sealed. We will not be betrayed from inside.

lines.text: Inshallah.
lines.actual_meaning: Whatever comes, we have placed ourselves in God's hands and in yours.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

scenes.deepest_moment: Eldar: "Inshallah." — radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: My house is yours. The open road — that I cannot promise.
lines.actual_meaning: I will die before they take you here, but I cannot protect you outside these walls.
lines.technique: understatement — mortal stakes buried under practical surface

lines.text: A letter must go to the Russian commander. My murid carries it. He needs a guide.
lines.actual_meaning: I have already weighed all risks. I need execution, not counsel.

lines.text: Two smokes to the ford. The mare knows it better than I do — but I know it too.
lines.actual_meaning: I am the best man for this and we both know it. Now name the coin.
lines.technique: shared unspoken knowledge — truth present between the lines

lines.text: Go tonight. Deliver it to the sardar's hand. No one else.
lines.actual_meaning: Failure here ends everything. I am trusting a stranger with my only move.

lines.text: Tonight, then. Inshallah.
lines.actual_meaning: God willing — and if not God, then still tonight.

scenes.deepest_moment: Sado: "My house is yours. The open road — that I cannot promise." — understatement — mortal stakes buried under practical surface

lines.text: Canst thou take him there — and bring him back?
lines.actual_meaning: I am not paying for a one-way trip. I am paying for a man who returns.

lines.text: I can. There is not another Chechen who would pass as I can.
lines.actual_meaning: My worth is the route. Without me, you go nowhere.

lines.text: A rope should be long. A speech — short.
lines.actual_meaning: You are already talking too much. Prove it with your feet.

lines.text: Then I'll hold my tongue.
lines.actual_meaning: I accept. And I am not offended.

lines.text: By the bend of the Argun — the two haystacks at the forest glade. Ask for Khan Mahoma. He knows what to do.
lines.actual_meaning: The plan is already in motion. You are the last piece.

lines.text: Eat first. The road does not leave before morning.
lines.actual_meaning: This house still offers peace. Whatever comes, that remains.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "Canst thou take him there — and bring him back?" — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: To be handed to my son.
lines.actual_meaning: My son is hostage. This note is the only thread I hold.

lines.text: Where must the answer be sent?
lines.actual_meaning: I am already committed — I only need the mechanics.

lines.text: To thee. And thou must forward it to me.
lines.actual_meaning: You are now my courier. That is kunak duty, not request.

lines.text: It shall be done.
lines.actual_meaning: My life is now also pledged to your son's survival.

lines.text: Our honey is good. This year above all others — plentiful and good.
lines.actual_meaning: You are a guest in this house. For this moment, pretend the war is outside.

lines.text: I thank thee.
lines.actual_meaning: The honey. The house. The note. All of it.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "To be handed to my son." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Good job it's dry. Last week I had water in my boots for three days.
lines.actual_meaning: He is managing fear with talk about small discomforts — the body, not the danger.

lines.text: They say he crossed over near Mahket. Hadji Murad himself. You believe it?
lines.actual_meaning: He half-believes it. The name carries weight even here.

scenes.deepest_moment: Panov: "Good job it's dry. Last week I had water in my boots for three days." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Good job it's dry.
lines.actual_meaning: Noting the small mercy that makes a hard night bearable.

lines.text: What are you looking for?
lines.actual_meaning: Already watching Panov, already half a step ahead.

lines.text: Bowl of my pipe. Where the devil has it got to.
lines.actual_meaning: Small loss, real irritation — a man's comforts are few.

lines.text: Stem's there though.
lines.actual_meaning: The problem is already solved in his mind.

lines.text: What a smart lad you are, Avdeev.
lines.actual_meaning: Genuine warmth, rare between these men — Avdeev is liked.

lines.text: That'll be as the company decides.
lines.actual_meaning: Deflecting — unwilling to take sides on the officer question, loyal by default.

scenes.deepest_moment: PANOV: "Good job it's dry." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: It's not the first time. He takes it, he gives it back.
lines.actual_meaning: Don't start a fight we can't finish — the hierarchy always wins.

lines.text: The community is a strong man.
lines.actual_meaning: I agree with you, Panov, to end this before it turns ugly.

lines.text: Panov... do you ever feel dull?
lines.actual_meaning: I am disappearing out here and I need someone to notice.

lines.text: Dull, why?
lines.actual_meaning: Don't ask me to carry this. I'm barely carrying my own.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: I do. Sometimes so dull I don't know what I might not do to myself. That time I drank all the money — that was from it. It took hold of me till I thought: I'll just get blind drunk.
lines.actual_meaning: I am confessing to a darkness I have no name for.

lines.text: Sometimes drinking makes it worse.
lines.actual_meaning: I know exactly what you mean and I will not say so aloud.

scenes.deepest_moment: PANOV: "Dull, why?" — radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: It's chiefly because of that — went instead of my brother — that I feel so dull. He's living like a king. And I'm here.
lines.actual_meaning: He chose sacrifice and now can't forgive himself for it.

lines.text: Well, brother. That's how it is.
lines.actual_meaning: There's no comfort to give. He knows it. Avdeev knows it.

lines.text: Me — friendly Chechen. Gun, yok. Sword, yok. Want prince.
lines.actual_meaning: I am unarmed. I am a messenger. Do not shoot.

lines.text: On your knees. Both of you.
lines.actual_meaning: I don't trust this, but I'm listening.

lines.text: Letter. For prince. Hadji Murat sends.
lines.actual_meaning: This is bigger than you. Don't make a mistake.

scenes.deepest_moment: Panov: "Well, brother. That's how it is." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Prince want. Big business.
lines.actual_meaning: I carry enough authority to demand access — don't treat me as a prisoner.

lines.text: You know, mates — those shaved-headed boys are fine. One of them's married. I asked him, 'Molly bar?' He says 'bar.' Two of them. What a talk.
lines.actual_meaning: The enemy is a man like me — that fact is too large to sit with quietly.

lines.text: Nice. Meet him alone and he'd let your guts out soon enough.
lines.actual_meaning: Don't get soft. Softness gets you killed.

lines.text: Maybe so. Still — fine fellows.
lines.actual_meaning: I know. I don't care.

scenes.deepest_moment: Bata: "Prince want. Big business." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: That is the second ace you have sacrificed tonight.
lines.actual_meaning: You are embarrassing this regiment in its own drawing room.

lines.text: Mais voyez-vous — the cards conspire against me, mon cher.
lines.actual_meaning: I am not here for the cards.

lines.text: Do forgive him. I distracted him — didn't I tell you so?
lines.actual_meaning: I know exactly what I am doing.

scenes.deepest_moment: Regimental Adjutant: "That is the second ace you have sacrificed tonight." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Is it your company ordered to the forest tomorrow?
lines.actual_meaning: I know what the officer on duty brought. You will see it for yourself soon enough.

lines.text: Yes. Mine. Why?
lines.actual_meaning: He is barely listening — his eyes track Marya Vasilevna across the room.

lines.text: Then we shall meet tomorrow.
lines.actual_meaning: The prize I have been offered will land in your sector first.

scenes.deepest_moment: Michael Vorontsov: "Is it your company ordered to the forest tomorrow?" — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Eh bien. Vous allez me dire ce que c'est.
lines.actual_meaning: I already know. I want to see if you'll lie to me.

lines.text: Mais, ma chère—
lines.actual_meaning: Stalling. He has no plausible denial ready.

lines.text: C'était Hadji Murat, n'est-ce pas?
lines.actual_meaning: Say yes. Say it was him. Let me have been right about something tonight.

lines.text: Not Hadji Murat himself. His emissary. He will come tomorrow — to meet me at the wood-cutting site.
lines.actual_meaning: The correction is real but the pride is unmistakable: I will deliver him to my father.

lines.text: Tomorrow.
lines.actual_meaning: Not a question. She is calculating what that means for Simon — and for the man coming in.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

scenes.deepest_moment: Marya Vasilevna: "Tomorrow." — radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: What is it?
lines.actual_meaning: He has already counted the doors and the men.
lines.technique: tactical surface — professional calm over lethal calculation

lines.text: Listen. A woman from her roof saw you. The aoul knows. The Elders have gone to the mosque. They mean to keep you here.
lines.actual_meaning: I have failed to hide you, but I have not failed you yet.

lines.text: It is well. I must be off.
lines.actual_meaning: The matter is decided; do not try to keep me.
lines.technique: implication — decision already made, surface is aftermath

lines.text: My house is your house. The horses are saddled.
lines.actual_meaning: I will die before they take you from this room.
lines.technique: understatement — mortal stakes buried under practical surface

lines.text: Eldar.
lines.actual_meaning: We are leaving now. No questions.

lines.text: And — ready.
lines.actual_meaning: I was already awake; I am yours.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "What is it?" — tactical surface — professional calm over lethal calculation

lines.text: Sado — may God reward you.
lines.actual_meaning: I will not see you again, and we both know it.
lines.technique: shared unspoken knowledge — truth present between the lines

lines.text: Inshallah. Ride.
lines.actual_meaning: Do not waste this moment on me.

lines.text: And — Agha. Ahead.
lines.actual_meaning: I have already chosen which man I would kill first.

lines.text: Allah knows.
lines.actual_meaning: The matter is closed; the ride is the only argument now.
lines.technique: implication — decision already made, surface is aftermath

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "Sado — may God reward you." — shared unspoken knowledge — truth present between the lines

lines.text: Stop. Who's that. Stop!
lines.actual_meaning: We have to be seen to try — Shamil is watching.

lines.text: Sado.
lines.actual_meaning: I take your roof with me; I cannot give it back.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: Go. The road is yours.
lines.actual_meaning: I will die before I name where you went.
lines.technique: understatement — mortal stakes buried under practical surface

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "Sado." — radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: What do you want?
lines.actual_meaning: I have already decided what happens next; speak quickly.
lines.technique: implication — decision already made, surface is aftermath

lines.text: Do you wish to take me?... Take me, then.
lines.actual_meaning: The first man forward dies; the second decides whether more die.

lines.text: Agha.
lines.actual_meaning: I am here. Whichever one steps first, he is mine.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: It is well.
lines.actual_meaning: The matter is decided. The talking ends here.
lines.technique: implication — decision already made, surface is aftermath

scenes.deepest_moment: Eldar: "Agha." — radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: Put out the fire.
lines.actual_meaning: We are hunted. The fire is a target.

lines.text: Has Bata been here?
lines.actual_meaning: Are the first steps of the plan already in motion?

lines.text: Long ago. With Khan Mahoma. That way.
lines.actual_meaning: The mission moves faster than you. It is already beyond your reach.

lines.text: We must take care. I was followed.
lines.actual_meaning: I am already an enemy of the world I left.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "Put out the fire." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Eh — the prince himself. We sat, we ate. White bread.
lines.actual_meaning: The mission went better than expected; he is proud and wants HM to feel reassured

lines.text: What did he say.
lines.actual_meaning: Strip the pleasure from it — give me the substance

lines.text: He is pleased. He will receive you. Tomorrow, if you come.
lines.actual_meaning: The door is open — all HM's calculation has worked

lines.text: It is well.
lines.actual_meaning: He expected this — fate has confirmed what he already knew

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "What did he say." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Well. He actually came.
lines.actual_meaning: He expected a trap or a no-show — not this.

lines.text: Eh — I told you. He said he would come. He came.
lines.actual_meaning: Pride in having brokered this. Also mild reproach at Russian skepticism.

lines.text: Tell him the prince expects him. We ride at once.
lines.actual_meaning: He has no script for this moment — falls back on orders.

lines.text: It is well.
lines.actual_meaning: He has already read every Russian face in the clearing. He sees what they are.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "It is well." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Hullo — that's our line. Kostya, now's your chance. Get back to the company. I'll bring the whole force up and we'll arrange a battle that will be simply delightful... and then we'll make a report.
lines.actual_meaning: He performs valor the way Sleptsov performed it in the story they just told — for the record, for the report, for the wo

lines.text: Sir.
lines.actual_meaning: He understands the game. He does not question it.

scenes.deepest_moment: FREZE: "Sir." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Splendid morning for it. Carry on, eh?
lines.actual_meaning: He has decided to make a war out of nothing because nothing is what frightens him.

lines.text: As you say, your honor.
lines.actual_meaning: He has seen this kind of order kill a man before breakfast.

scenes.deepest_moment: Panov: "As you say, your honor." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: What is it, lad. Hit?
lines.actual_meaning: He is trying to keep the salon voice on; the salon voice is failing.

lines.text: Just going to load, your honor. Heard a click. Looked, and he'd dropped his gun.
lines.actual_meaning: He is reciting because reciting is the only thing keeping him upright.

lines.text: It doesn't hurt. Only stops me walking. A drop of vodka, your honor.
lines.actual_meaning: It hurts. He is asking, without asking, to be eased out of the world.

lines.text: My soul turns against it, brother. You drink.
lines.actual_meaning: He is letting go of the body — of its small comforts — quietly, in advance.

lines.text: Well, brother. Never mind.
lines.actual_meaning: He is naming the thing as small so it will not crush them both.

scenes.deepest_moment: Panov: "Well, brother. Never mind." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: My soul turns against it. Drink it yourself.
lines.actual_meaning: I will not have my last act be a flinch — and I want him to have it.

lines.text: Well, brother. Never mind.
lines.actual_meaning: I cannot bear this and I will not let you see it.

lines.text: Your honor — the colonel.
lines.actual_meaning: Compose yourself, the institution is here.

lines.text: All right. Will you see to him?
lines.actual_meaning: I am abandoning him to you because the rank requires it.

scenes.deepest_moment: Panov: "Well, brother. Never mind." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Hadji Murad. You are welcome here. You have my word.
lines.actual_meaning: I will protect you as far as my rank allows — and we are about to discover together how short that distance is.

lines.text: Sardar. Hadji Murad has come. It is well.
lines.actual_meaning: The decision is made in my head; I have crossed the line and there is no further discussion.

lines.text: It is only a matter of arrangements now. My father's house will receive you, mon cher. You are quite, quite safe.
lines.actual_meaning: I am converting a political prisoner into a personal guest because that is the only register I can decently inhabit.

lines.text: I am the Tsar's servant. Allah knows.
lines.actual_meaning: I am performing the role required for survival; the mountains remain my only true allegiance — and this topic ends here.

lines.text: Splendid. We shall ride together to the fort.
lines.actual_meaning: I am ending the formal address before either of us says anything that cannot be unsaid.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "Sardar. Hadji Murad has come. It is well." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: I surrender myself to the will of the Russian Tsar. I wish to serve him. I wished to long ago — Shamil would not let me.
lines.actual_meaning: This is not defeat; it is a tactical repositioning. The words are for the record, not the heart.

lines.text: You honor us. My father has spoken of you.
lines.actual_meaning: He needs this more than HM does. The Vorontsov name needs the trophy.

lines.text: These men serve the Russians. As I do.
lines.actual_meaning: He is claiming his murids as non-negotiable; they are not prisoners, they are his household.

lines.text: They are welcome here.
lines.actual_meaning: He means: within limits I have not yet disclosed.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "These men serve the Russians. As I do." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Do you know who that is?
lines.actual_meaning: I want this name to land — I want them to feel what I've done today.

lines.text: No, Your Excellency.
lines.actual_meaning: Wary — officers who single you out usually mean trouble.

lines.text: Hadji Murad.
lines.actual_meaning: Just the name. Let it do the work.

lines.text: We've beaten him many a time, Your Excellency. And he's given us plenty back.
lines.actual_meaning: Respect without submission — the man's a soldier too, and soldiers know soldiers.

lines.text: Let them look.
lines.actual_meaning: This moment is mine — and theirs. It will travel.

scenes.deepest_moment: Simon Vorontsov: "Do you know who that is?" — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Tell the prince: Hadji Murad is in his house. A kunak's house is sacred to him. His family is sacred.
lines.actual_meaning: Establishing the terms of this arrangement on his own code — not Russian hospitality, adat.

lines.text: If every time a kunak admired something you gave it to him — you would soon have nothing left at all.
lines.actual_meaning: Testing how much of a man he is beneath the legend; flirting with danger at safe distance.

lines.text: Allah knows. A man keeps only what he does not show.
lines.actual_meaning: He deflects the joke into philosophy — he will not play the exotic curiosity.

lines.text: You will dine with us tonight, of course. My wife has been impatient to meet you.
lines.actual_meaning: Covering his relief that the meeting went well — and his anxiety about Petersburg's reaction — with practiced grace.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "Tell the prince: Hadji Murad is in his house. A kunak's house is sacred to him. " — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Thy son, kunak?
lines.actual_meaning: Testing the boundaries of this hospitality — how much warmth is real, how much performance

lines.text: A beautiful dagger. I thank thee.
lines.actual_meaning: Accepting the gift also means accepting the obligation — he knows it

lines.text: I want nothing. Only a place to say my prayers.
lines.actual_meaning: I will not ask you for anything that lets you feel you hold me

lines.text: Horses in the stable. Men in the barn. Arms not taken. Interpreter brings food.
lines.actual_meaning: He has checked everything you would check. We are not yet prisoners.

lines.text: Good.
lines.actual_meaning: Not reassured — that a cage is comfortable does not make it less a cage
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "Good." — radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: He takes from my side of the dish. Every time.
lines.actual_meaning: He suspects poison — and he is right not to trust us.

lines.text: He will pray again at sunset. The fifth hour.
lines.actual_meaning: I am showing him I pay attention — I want him to feel seen.

lines.text: Again.
lines.actual_meaning: This machine is strange power — I want to understand it.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: Give it to him.
lines.actual_meaning: A gift costs nothing and binds him to us.
He accepts — but the hand goes to his chest first, over his heart. The old courtesy. Not submission.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "Again." — radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: The general is expecting you. A formality only.
lines.actual_meaning: He is trying to soothe HM while managing his own dread of this meeting.

lines.text: I have waited before.
lines.actual_meaning: I know what anterooms mean. Every power uses them the same way.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "I have waited before." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: All negotiations with the enemy pass through me. Why was I not informed?
lines.actual_meaning: You made me invisible in my own command — I need that corrected on record.

lines.text: His emissary came to me. He wished to surrender to no one else. I intended to report to you — there was no time to—
lines.actual_meaning: The situation moved faster than protocol. I am not sorry for the result.

lines.text: I have not served twenty-seven years so that men who began yesterday, relying on family connections, should act under my nose.
lines.actual_meaning: Your name got you here. My rank means nothing to you or to Petersburg.

lines.text: Your Excellency, I ask you not to say things that are not correct.
lines.actual_meaning: I will not let that stand — but I cannot afford to break with him.

lines.text: Come, Baron — Simon did not wish to displease you. You know what they say: a bad peace is worth more than a good quarrel.
lines.actual_meaning: I am ending this before either of you does something irreversible.

lines.text: Very well. He stays here — under my jurisdiction — until I send him to the left flank commander.
lines.actual_meaning: I will accept the peace, but the prize is mine to administer.

scenes.deepest_moment: Simon Vorontsov: "His emissary came to me. He wished to surrender to no one else. I intended to re" — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Five shots. Just five.
lines.actual_meaning: I took twenty in a raid and walked out. Why him?

lines.text: Each man gets what fate sends.
lines.actual_meaning: There is no justice here. Stop asking.

lines.text: Don't — don't fuss.
lines.actual_meaning: I know what this is. Let me have some quiet with it.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hand-Wound Soldier: "Five shots. Just five." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: What's this on his back?
lines.actual_meaning: He is already filing the body — the man is paperwork now.

lines.text: That was done long ago, your honor. For the money I drank. And there you are.
lines.actual_meaning: Naming the punishment is easier than naming the wound; he is offering the doctor a story to file instead of a death.

lines.text: Petrukha. Have you no message for home?
lines.actual_meaning: Treats him as a son, not a soldier — Panov has stopped soldiering and started witnessing.

lines.text: Serogin... write so. 'Your son Peter has given orders that you should live long. He envied his brother — I told you about that today — and now he is himself glad. Don't worry him. Let him live. God grant it. I am glad.' Write that.
lines.actual_meaning: He is asking, without asking, whether his life still belonged to anyone — and answering himself: it did, and it was smal

lines.text: And your pipe — did you find it, brother?
lines.actual_meaning: He has come too close to the truth and is stepping back from it; the pipe is the smallest, safest thing he can think to

lines.text: Well then. Give me a candle to hold. That's how it is.
lines.actual_meaning: He has accepted something he does not agree with — quietly, without ceremony.

scenes.deepest_moment: Panov: "Petrukha. Have you no message for home?" — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: How goes it, my lad. Badly?
lines.actual_meaning: He is using the lightest possible phrase because the heavier ones would crack his voice.

lines.text: Splendid fellow. Splendid.
lines.actual_meaning: He cannot find the words a man of consequence is supposed to have here, so he reaches for the smallest, most useless one

lines.text: Sir?
lines.actual_meaning: A simple question that exposes how empty the officer's hands are.
lines.technique: radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: Nothing. Carry on.
lines.actual_meaning: The first time tonight he means 'nothing' instead of 'splendid' — and it is the truer word.

scenes.deepest_moment: Orderly: "Sir?" — radical economy — single utterance multiple registers

lines.text: Bring a candle. I am going to die.
lines.actual_meaning: He is not asking for comfort — he is issuing his last directive, asserting the one act of will still open to him.

lines.text: How goes it, my lad. Badly?
lines.actual_meaning: He already knows. The question is the only form of presence he knows how to offer.

lines.text: It was in my gag.
lines.actual_meaning: He is accounting for the candle — the small practical fact is all he has to offer against the size of what is happening.

scenes.deepest_moment: PANOV: "It was in my gag." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Which church do we go to for the requiem?
lines.actual_meaning: She will not break. Grief is a task to be managed, not performed.
lines.technique: performance refusal — grief as discipline not spectacle

scenes.deepest_moment: Avdeev's Mother: "Which church do we go to for the requiem?" — performance refusal — grief as discipline not spectacle

lines.text: It would seem our Caucasus has produced a surprise. Hadji Murad has crossed to our side.
lines.actual_meaning: I now hold a piece the Tsar cannot ignore. This is my advantage.

lines.text: Then we must receive him properly.
lines.actual_meaning: I understand the political stakes — I will help you make this a performance.

lines.text: Mon cher, we already are.
lines.actual_meaning: The reception has begun the moment I chose to read this here, in front of witnesses.

scenes.deepest_moment: Elizabeth Ksaverevna Vorontsova: "Then we must receive him properly." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Simon a eu de la chance. Hadji Murad — Shamil's right hand — has come over to us. He will be in Tiflis within days.
lines.actual_meaning: My son delivered me a political prize. This table should understand what that means for my command.

lines.text: Hadji Murad. Here.
lines.actual_meaning: I know that name from another world — not the one at this table.

lines.text: I have met him. More than once, Princess.
lines.actual_meaning: I survived those meetings. I would rather not elaborate on the terms.

lines.text: He will dine with us, I imagine. When he is ready.
lines.actual_meaning: He is already mine to schedule — the threat is already archived.

scenes.deepest_moment: Princess Manana Orbelyani: "Hadji Murad. Here." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: It was he who cut the detachment in two at the rescue — if your Excellency will permit me to call it that.
lines.actual_meaning: Oblivious to the social wound he is reopening; proud of his story, proud of Hadji Murad's cleverness.

lines.text: Where, did you say?
lines.actual_meaning: He heard perfectly. He is testing whether the man will say the word again — and giving him one last chance not to.

lines.text: At the rescue, your Excellency. He had us nearly encircled before the fresh troops arrived.
lines.actual_meaning: Still oblivious — he admires Hadji Murad and wants credit for having witnessed greatness.

lines.text: General — have you found comfortable quarters here in Tiflis? I hear the upper district is quite impossible this season.
lines.actual_meaning: She is saving Vorontsov. This is a social rescue of her own — performed without acknowledgment.

scenes.deepest_moment: Michael Vorontsov: "Where, did you say?" — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: The prince will see you directly.
lines.actual_meaning: You are not like the others. The rules bend for you.

scenes.deepest_moment: Fair-Haired Aide-de-Camp: "The prince will see you directly." — compression — short surface, layered meaning

lines.text: Sardar. Hadji Murad places himself under the protection of the great Tsar and of yourself.
lines.actual_meaning: I name you my patron because no other door is open. Watch what I withhold.

lines.text: He places himself under the protection of the great Tsar and of Your Excellency.
lines.actual_meaning: I render only the words; the meaning is between these two.

lines.text: Vorontsov. Shamil is my enemy and yours. I will serve in faith to the last drop. Allah knows.
lines.actual_meaning: The door is closed on this question. Now move.

lines.text: Mon cher Hadji Murad. Such resolve, one might suppose, deserves a resolve to match it. Quite, quite.
lines.actual_meaning: I have heard you and I will give you nothing today.

lines.text: My mother. My wives. My son Yusuf. They are in the imam's hand.
lines.actual_meaning: Every hour you delay, a knife moves nearer to my son.

lines.text: I shall write to Petersburg, mon ami. You are entirely free here, of course. Is it not so?
lines.actual_meaning: You are placed in a cage of paperwork. You are entirely watched.

scenes.deepest_moment: Hadji Murad: "Sardar. Hadji Murad places himself under the protection of the great Tsar and of" — compression — short surface, layered meaning

worst_offenders.line: It's chiefly because of that — went instead of my brother — that I feel so dull. He's living like a king. And I'm here.
worst_offenders.fix_suggestion: Add deflection beat — address a third subject instead of naming the feeling directly

best_moments.why: I am here. You know what it means that I am here.
Whatever comes, we have placed ourselves in God's hands and in yours.
He has already counted the doors and the men.
I was already awake; I am yours.
I will not see you again, and we both know it.
